h1adc8849g61b9g4e9ag9f5eg1b6ad6bc5e77: Dammit all. Do you have to smash every roach we walk past?
hcc29b81bgb757g4077gb621gc8b0b2173d7a: I had business with the bastard!
hb714af53gccf5g4812g97b7g3e44e7ffae6c: Forget it. We push forward, find a cure. We're a team, after all. At least till I hear different.
ha24ba4e3gaa8dg4d02g8d63g2d89855c1d7d: Besides, there are ways to make a roach's corpse talk.
h72179b87g3ca5g4dd8ga390g15bf15bb9d93: *A strange sensation courses through you, and your companion's mind unfolds, secrets half-revealed.*
hecc20301ga231g465dg9befg9db46dd91ab5: You came looking for someone named Mizora. Who is she?
hc0ac87aag18c1g4c41gad2bg8df2747aa835: I... you're right. It's time you knew the truth.
h67b1fa7fg28dcg487dg93e3g842e21857d31: You need to level with me, Wyll. What 'business' did you have with the goblin?
hdbab244bg1f6fg4ec1g98c5gc4bf50c2f50b: You need to level with me, Wyll. What business did you have with the goblins?
h8c8766c5g7100g4c2ag8339ga37501120499: Personal business. And for now, I'd like to keep it that way.
h71aa9fcege9e4g46bdgb32cg3d613e4e9281: Explore his mind. What is he keeping from you?
h0e0e8596gbeabg46b7g857cgf0880d7f4aaf: *A single name passes from Wyll's mind to yours: 'Mizora'.*
hbfa4363dgd84cg4420g9728gf40d7627ca7c: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h15fecb41gcf34g4bfegb128g7307bb51ff33: Ouch. You could have warned me before you went poking in there.
h6bd56c9ag6fe0g4de4g8f1egd14e237510a4: Well - I suppose it's time you knew the truth.
he4007a8bg3b5cg4bb2gba27g1e4b736a665b: We're not the only ones the mind flayers snatched up. They took a... an old flame of mine, too. Mizora.
h00101e79g7d31g4f3cgb1d3geadc8675df63: Goblin called Spike dragged her from her squid-pod, roughed her up good. No sign of her here though, near as I've seen.
hf6a9678dg0bccg46bega363g11e4c8d471a7: Not the first time the bugger's given me trouble. We've got a history.
hc7e85422ged0fg45c5g9cb4gc839f0929a88: I  know you want answers. But it's not the time or the place.
hbc967912g4885g452cg9f11gba68e4d23384: We'll talk in camp when I'm ready. And I'll tell you what you want to know.
hf8a24033g5364g4c53gb025g021e0737ce07: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
hb79c0e5bgbac4g4f66g94a6ge3afd1b47594: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
h6284bd64g2ff3g4317g929fga7d7251634f2: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
hd54b4b90ga017g4065g9191gdc5345572641: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
hb544dfabgc2e1g4778g97f4g9d173033d3c5: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h4e6660efgdd42g421bgb9bfgde2366c82e96: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
hd55af70cgaeffg474agbcefgf410cb28182f: Explore his mind. What is he keeping from you?
h2973c86fg9627g48d4gae2agf2ae6cd2e182: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
hbf71d96ag6e6dg4663gaa36g30dd6f76d331: *You focus on the source of the power, but it is quiet and still. It needs to rest.*
hba93830fgb408g4823g946dg3bcb8dc02744: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
h4a834d87gf06eg4eb9g8abbgb3e4fb397ccb: Where did they take you, Mizora? And why won't you answer me?
he297a933g24f3g4549ga585g9cd07077e84b: How about you leave my mind alone?
hc1e9ddf7gc60fg4a3bg94aag3d6d7faed187: My business is personal. And for now, I'd like to keep it that way.
hb3cd3d85ga6e1g46e4gb4bcgab430fbec823: Forget it. We push forward, find a cure. We're a team after all. Even if it seems you forgot.
hf25193a4ge8aag46ccgadfdgbaae4610b9a5: Just go easy on the skull-splitting, yeah? The pieces can't always be put back together.
hdf6095a1gbba1g410egae86g319f23862e5c: Watch your tone. If you wish to travel with me, you will respect my decisions.
hf2f0b8d6gf981g44c3g9697g03fed150b8ae: You know what? That's fair. You've not done me much wrong.
h7b821f41gca6dg48e4g9111g43cd7e8d22f5: Let's move on, shall we? Push forward, find a cure. We're a team, after all.
h8dc3aa46g1bd2g42b5g8f7dg3e7ff556770a: I will respect your decisions when you make good ones. And those seem in short supply.
h3d6ae4bdg72d7g42d5g9770gdd85f7d38d58: Next time, go easy on the skull-splitting. The pieces can't always be put back together.
h1c4b8e0cg2c12g44acgaf1bgb1178f5e3f32: You want my respect? Go easy on the skull-splitting.
h3e13d232gffceg4945gba3fg55a2b1c03421: The pieces can't always be put back together.
h0f2c7ce3g8108g4704gbde9g7a5cb6705787: Dammit all. Do you have to smash every roach we walk past?
